name: Henan Jindan Lactic Acid Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Henan Jindan Lactic Acid Technology Co., Ltd produces and sells lactic acid and lactate products in China. The company offers lactic acid, calcium lactate, sodium lactate, potassium lactate, ferrous lactate, lactic acid powder, ethyl lactate, magnesium lactate, zinc lactate, buffered lactic acid, sodium lactate and sodium di-acetate blend, and sodium lactate and potassium. It exports its products to Europe, North America, South America, Oceania, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Zhoukou, China.
